description: You are a sales operations lead. Create a monthly performance report in Power BI Desktop using the data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv. The report page should be named "Monthly Performance". Define DAX measures for Total_Revenue (sum of Sales_Amount) and Avg_Discount_Pct (average of Discount). Construct a Line and Clustered Column Chart displaying these measures by Sale_Date at the month grain. The chart must include a constant reference line at 50,000 for the revenue axis and a constant reference line at 0.15 for the discount axis. Save the completed report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Combo_Reference_Report.pbix.
